summary: A highly regarded audience recording that captures the Dead’s live flavor, praised for its vivid sound.
review: The reviewer celebrates this Feo & Fitzy audience (AUD) capture as a wonderful addition to their collection, noting it provides a more authentic Dead experience than many soundboard recordings. No specific songs or performance details are mentioned, but the overall impression is very positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review focuses on the audience recording’s appeal; limited detail on musical performance keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording praised for its lively flavor and lack of reported audio issues.
